en_title: Rick and Morty Season 9, Episode 2 Review: "Ricks Days, Seven Nights"
cn_title: 《瑞克和莫蒂》第9季第2集评测：瑞克之日，七天之夜
subtitle: 悲伤的瑞克才是最好的瑞克
opus_summary: 《瑞克和莫蒂》第9季第2集以9分高分强势反弹。本集讲述瑞克伪装成普通人泰德试图享受度假生活，却被迫与自己（的无人机大军）正面对抗。当他击败自己后，却发现朋友因见识了他的真实生活而离他而去，度假早已名存实亡。结局中瑞克（泰德）按下红色按钮的留白，是该系列对瑞克存在之痛苦最深刻的表达。

paragraphs.en: Warning: This review contains full spoilers for Rick and Morty Season 9, Episode 2!
paragraphs.cn: 警告：本文包含《瑞克和莫蒂》第9季第2集完整剧透！

paragraphs.en: Rick and Morty's ninth season didn't have the strongest start in "There's Something About Morty," but that's ok. The series immediately bounces back with a surprisingly strong and emotionally charged sophomore episode. The show is often at its best when it explores the sheer misery that is Rick Sanchez's (Ian Cardoni) existence, and this episode is simply another reminder of that fact.
paragraphs.cn: 《瑞克和莫蒂》第9季的首播集《莫蒂不对劲》开局不算最强，但这没关系——系列立即用一集出奇强劲、情感饱满的第二集强势反弹。这部剧最擅长的，就是剖析瑞克·桑切斯（Ian Cardoni配音）存在的无尽痛苦，而这集不过是又一次提醒罢了。

paragraphs.en: The cleverly titled "Ricks Days, Seven Nights" throws us for a loop in its opening moments, as we're not sure what the heck is going on with Rick's latest misadventure. Why is he driving an RV? Why is he calling himself Ted and hanging around with a group of affable hicks in a bowling alley? This episode doesn't waste too much time before definitively resolving that mystery, and it's an amusing reveal when we discover the truth behind the situation and the lengths Rick will go to to guarantee himself a proper vacation.
paragraphs.cn: 片名巧妙的《瑞克之日，七天之夜》开场就把我们绕晕了——瑞克的最新闹剧让人摸不着头脑。他为什么开着房车？为什么自称泰德，和一群友善的乡下人在保龄球馆厮混？好在剧集没有故弄玄虚太久，谜底揭晓时颇为有趣——原来瑞克为了确保自己能好好度个假，不惜做到这种地步。

paragraphs.en: The supporting cast introduced in this episode is fine, if painted with a pretty broad brush. But those characters are mostly a means to an end. This is all about Rick in direct and literal conflict with himself, doing everything he can not to be ripped out of this idyllic existence and thrust back into the shoes of a multiverse-travelling mad scientist. It's a fundamentally sad conflict, so it's fitting that "Ricks Days, Seven Nights" is less overtly funny than many other chapters of the series.
paragraphs.cn: 本集引入的配角虽然刻画得比较粗略，倒也还行——但这些人大多只是工具人。核心是瑞克与自己的直接对抗：他竭尽全力不被拖出这个田园诗般的存在，不被塞回那个穿越多元宇宙的疯狂科学家的躯壳。这是一场本质上悲伤的冲突，所以《瑞克之日，七天之夜》不如许多集那么搞笑，也是合情合理的。

paragraphs.en: Not that there isn't some amusement to be had. This episode gets plenty of mileage out of "Ted" transforming his RV and ordinary bowling equipment into powerful weapons. There's the epic shoot-out in the bowling alley, as Ted and the gang make their successful (but ultimately tragic) stand against Rick's drone army. But as the death of Brenda (Amy Ryan) shows, there's a fundamental darkness lurking at the center of this conflict.
paragraphs.cn: 当然也不是没有笑点。「泰德」把房车和普通保龄球设备改装成强力武器的戏码就充满了乐趣。保龄球馆的枪战场面堪称一绝——泰德一伙成功（但最终悲剧性地）抵挡了瑞克的无人机大军。但正如布伦达（Amy Ryan配音）的死亡所揭示的那样，这场冲突的核心潜藏着根本性的黑暗。

paragraphs.en: The latter half of the episode really highlights that fact. It allows Ted and friends to win, but that victory immediately proves hollow and pyrrhic. The moment Ted's friends are exposed to his life as Rick, everything becomes tainted. They're no longer content to bowl, fish, and knock back a few brews. They crave laser eyes and portal guns and all the luxuries that come from being friends with the smartest guy in the universe. And so, predictably, everything quickly spirals out of control.
paragraphs.cn: 后半段则将这一点彻底放大。它让泰德和朋友们获胜，但胜利立刻被证明是空洞而惨烈的。当泰德的朋友们见识到他作为瑞克的人生后，一切都变了味——他们不再满足于打保龄、钓鱼、喝几杯啤酒。他们渴望激光眼、传送枪，以及一切与宇宙最聪明的人做朋友所能带来的奢侈。于是，不出所料，一切迅速失控。

paragraphs.en: Episode 2 really sinks its emotional hooks in during its closing minutes. By this point, Ted may have technically vanquished Rick, but he's become Rick in every way that truly matters. He's driven his friends away. He's profoundly unhappy and burdened by the cost of the super-science that surrounds him. His vacation is well and truly over.
paragraphs.cn: 第2集的情感钩子在最后几分钟真正扎入人心。此时，泰德虽然在技术上击败了瑞克，但在所有真正重要的方面，他已经变成了瑞克——他赶走了朋友，深感不幸，被身边超级科学的代价压得喘不过气。他的假期，确实、彻底地结束了。

paragraphs.en: The final scene between Rick and Morty (Harry Belden) is a particularly strong way to cap off this bleak little conflict. Ted desperately seeks some assurance that he'll be happier and more fulfilled than Rick, and to his credit, Morty tries to provide that assurance despite knowing how untrue it is. Then Ted relents and presses the red button. At that point, we're left to question whether the button did anything at all. Was there anything left of Ted to erase, or had he already completed his backslide into becoming Rick Sanchez again? Rarely has this series been so eloquent in spelling out the sheer pain of Rick's existence.
paragraphs.cn: 瑞克与莫蒂（Harry Belden配音）最后一场戏为这场黯淡的冲突画上了尤为有力的句号。泰德绝望地寻求保证——保证他会比瑞克更快乐、更满足。莫蒂值得称赞，尽管明知那不是真的，却还是努力给予了那样的保证。然后泰德松了劲儿，按下了红色按钮。此时我们不禁要问：按钮到底有没有用？还有「泰德」这个存在可以抹除吗？还是说他早已滑落回瑞克·桑切斯了？这个系列极少如此清晰地表达出瑞克存在的痛苦。

paragraphs.en: After a slightly disappointing premiere episode, Rick and Morty Season 9 immediately bounces back with a stellar Episode 2. "Ricks Days, Seven Nights" is less overtly humorous than many installments of the series, but that's part of its charm. This is a more emotionally charged and downright depressing glimpse into the misery of Rick Sanchez's existence. It shows us Rick in literal conflict with himself. And though his vacation self triumphs over his regular self, we see just how hollow and empty that victory is when Ted inevitably becomes Rick anyway. As ever, this series thrives when it's at its most depressing.
paragraphs.cn: 在略显令人失望的首播集之后，《瑞克和莫蒂》第9季用一集精彩的第2集强势反弹。《瑞克之日，七天之夜》不如该系列许多集那么幽默，但这正是它的魅力所在。这是对瑞克·桑切斯存在之痛苦一瞥，更充满情感、更加令人沮丧。它让我们看到瑞克与自己的直接对抗。虽然他的度假自我战胜了日常自我，但当泰德最终不可避免地变回瑞克时，我们看到那胜利是多么空洞。一如既往，这个系列在最令人沮丧的时候反而最精彩。
